articles.title: Troubleshooting payment API 503 spikes
articles.content: If payment API returns 503 in one region, verify upstream gateway saturation, recent deploys, and retry headers. Escalate to payments on-call if enterprise customer impact exceeds 10 minutes.

articles.title: Refund policy for delayed payments
articles.content: Refund requests above 500 USD require operations approval and account notes before confirmation to the customer.
